channel.title: Giftedness on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Giftedness on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: How Does Creative Giftedness Differ from Academic Giftedness? A Multidimensional Model
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine how does creative giftedness differ from academic giftedness? a multidimensional model. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper Go to the journal page for this article here.

item.title: French Validation of the Overexcitability Questionnaire 2: Psychometric Properties in a High-Potential Sample
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine french validation of the overexcitability questionnaire 2. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper Go to the journal page for this article here. Download the PDF here.
